blocks.content: Creating a new dashboard in a Git Sync provisioned folder follows the standard Grafana dashboard creation process. The key difference is selecting a provisioned folder as the location, which ensures the dashboard is tracked by Git Sync and saved to your connected repository.
To create a new dashboard in a Git Sync provisioned folder, complete the following steps:
In this section, you create a dashboard and add a first visualization.
In Grafana, click **Dashboards** in the navigation menu.

blocks.tooltip: Opens a blank dashboard ready for your first panel.

blocks.content: If the **Add** sidebar is not open, click **Add** (plus) in the dashboard edit pane.
In the **Add** sidebar, click **Panel** to add a panel to the dashboard.
Click **Edit visualization** (or **Configure visualization**) to open the panel editor.

Configure the data source:

1. Select a data source for your visualization, for example, `Prometheus`.
2. In **Queries & Expressions**, make sure query **A** is selected and your Prometheus data source is chosen, for example, `grafanacloud-learn-prom`.
Above the Metric field, find the **Builder** / **Code** toggle (next to **Run queries**) and click **Code**.
In the Code query field under query **A**, enter a PromQL query that exists in your data source, for example, `up`.
In the right sidebar, open the **All visualizations** tab and click **Time series**.
Click **Run queries** to refresh the preview.
Click **Back to dashboard** to return to the dashboard with your panel.
The dashboard is created with your first visualization. The dashboard remains unsaved until you save it to a Git Sync provisioned folder, which you'll do in the next milestone.

whenTrue.content: Dock this guide to the sidebar before you continue to the next milestone.

blocks.content: In the next milestone, you'll save the dashboard to Git using Git Sync workflows.

---

### More to explore (optional)

At this point in your journey, you can explore the following paths:

- [Create a dashboard](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/dashboards/build-dashboards/create-dashboard/)
